subject: Socialism is about power, not equality
body:
A crowd of Venezuelan Americans stood before President Donald J. Trump in Miami yesterday. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=17c3573f8f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 19, 2019
---
| | |
# **Socialism is about power, not equality**

**A crowd of Venezuelan Americans** stood before President Donald J. Trump in Miami yesterday, cheering as he put America squarely on the side of those fighting for freedom. “We’re here to proclaim a new day is coming in Latin America,” he said. “In Venezuela and across the western hemisphere, socialism is dying and liberty, prosperity, and democracy are being reborn.”

**His message to Nicolas Maduro:** “Let your people go.”

**American leadership** is making the difference. The United States and more than 50 countries across the world have recognized the rightful government of Venezuela. “Within 30 minutes, the United States was proud to be the first nation in the world to recognize President [Juan] Guaido” as the country’s interim leader, President Trump said.

**Venezuela, Cuba, and Nicaragua** offer a lesson to the world: Socialism always promises unity but delivers division and hatred. It promises a better future—and inevitably returns to the darkest chapters of the past. Not long ago, Venezuela was the richest country in South America. Today, after its tyrannical government nationalized industries and took over private business, nearly 90 percent of Venezuelans live in poverty.

**Americans know this history well** , having witnessed socialism destroy countries throughout the 20th century. Nearly three-fifths of Americans have an [unfavorable view of socialism](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f2f42d34a9&e=3ee4985eea); a majority have a favorable view of capitalism. Support for far-left schemes such as Medicare-for-All has plummeted as voters learn more about what’s in it. The extremist “Green New Deal” is beginning to suffer the same fate.

**“We know that socialism** is not about justice. It’s not about equality; it’s not about lifting up the poor,” President Trump said yesterday. “Socialism is about one thing only: power for the ruling class. And the more power they get, the more they crave . . . All of us here today know that there is nothing less democratic than socialism.”

[Watch: “The United States of America is standing right by their side.” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=63d99266d5&e=3ee4985eea)

**Worth sharing:**[“We are born free, and we will stay free—now and forever.”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4228737bcf&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## **The Space Force is here**

**President Trump** signed Space Policy Directive-4 this afternoon, marking a bold step toward American space dominance by setting in motion the process of creating a U.S. Space Force as the sixth branch of our Armed Forces.

**The Directive calls** on the Secretary of Defense to develop a legislative proposal for the Space Force, embodying President Trump’s vision for keeping Americans safe:
* Strengthen America’s ability to compete—and win—in an increasingly contested domain

* Organize, train, and equip our space warfighters with next-generation capabilities

* Maximize successful warfighting capability while minimizing bureaucracy

**Peace through strength** has been President Trump’s foreign policy since day one, and this newest frontier is no exception. The United States is the best in space, and our adversaries know it. They want to restrict our access there to undermine our strategic advantage. With the U.S. Space Force up and running, that won’t happen.

[Get the facts: America’s destiny in space is secure.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=888c003176&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch:** [President Trump signs the Space Force directive](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fd9e4ba7be&e=3ee4985eea)

name: Bernie 2020
subject: Before midnight
body:
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=553%2E150750%2EY0a0ig)

As the clock ticks toward midnight, we’re pretty close to reaching a pair of milestones we frankly didn’t think would be possible on day one.
First, we’re just short of 350,000 signatures from people saying they support Bernie’s campaign for president. That’s 35% percent of the way to goal. Amazing.
But what we didn’t expect is that more than 140,000 people would donate as well. Reaching 150,000 donations before midnight would send a pretty powerful message about the strength of our movement.
**If you are able to chip in $3, we’re going to do it! And we’re so close it could be your contribution that gets us there. Use this link:**
[**https://act.berniesanders.com/go/support-our-campaign**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190219-4-full-120-plus&t=2&akid=553%2E150750%2EY0a0ig)
Thanks for making day one such a success.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie

Paid for by Bernie 2020
PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to, [unsubscribe using this link](https://bernie.actionkit.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=553%2E150750%2EY0a0ig). But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=4&refcode2=553_150750_Y0a0ig&akid=553%2E150750%2EY0a0ig).

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: hoping to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Peter, after a hectic first six weeks in Congress, I'm thrilled to be spending this week back in Central Virginia.
| | Peter,

After a hectic first six weeks in Congress, I'm thrilled to be spending this week back in Central Virginia.

I'm having meetings with individuals, advocates, and businesses across the district, and I'm eager to tell people at home what I've been working on -- from protecting federal workers from any future government shutdowns to making smart investments in our infrastructure. But most of all, I'm looking forward to doing a lot of listening this week.

We hosted a Town Hall in Goochland County last night, and we have more coming up. Across our events -- town halls, round tables, and meet-and-greets -- I enjoy hearing what's on people's minds, listening to the questions they ask, and understanding what important to them. But I want to hear from you too, Peter.

**[Will you take our short priorities survey today to let me know what matters most to you and your family?](https://act.myngp.com/el/cAIVItFgM6PMQbNvuFyZuwQUQ1bXlIJgo429chRo_u8=/dSzE7mEJJ8cfp2RJEXKIofGZ81j00jbKxoTmEs68rT4=)**

Thank you so much for your input.

Abigail

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/cAIVItFgM6PMQbNvuFyZuwQUQ1bXlIJgo429chRo_u8=/tT1DsBllt8B182W6zA5qSYysYBq0zC7-eU53LTfuihY=?refcode=em_surv_2019.02.20_b1_as_all&amount=25)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat, former CIA officer, and representative for Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. # **25 MS-13 Gang Members Deported from Migrant Caravan in Mexico, Officials Say**

“At least 25 people affiliated with the MS-13 gang were deported from Mexico after they were revealed to be concealed within the caravan of 1,600 Central American migrants just across the U.S. border, immigration officials said Tuesday,” Jacqui Heinrich and Travis Fedschun report for Fox News.

“The caravan first arrived in Piedras Negras, Mexico, two weeks ago across the border from Eagle Pass, Texas, when officials from the Instituto Nacional de Migración identified 10 gang members from Mara Salvatrucha, also known as MS-13. But after warehouse scuffles with police last week, officials discovered and deported 15 additional MS-13 ‘agitators,’ INM Media Deputy Director Aline Juarez told Fox News.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2596319ed3&e=3ee4985eea)

| “President Trump is making the right move by supporting Juan Guaidó as Venezuela's self-declared interim president, Latin America expert Lindsay Singleton said Tuesday on _[Hill.TV](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d438e311ac&e=3ee4985eea)_ ,” Tess Bonn writes. President Trump “ramped up pressure on Venezuela’s embattled president, Nicolás Maduro, during a speech in Miami, where he voiced support for Guaidó’s attempt to remove Maduro from power. Trump also warned about the perils of socialism and called for Maduro to end the humanitarian aid blockade.”
---
|
---
| “President Donald Trump signed a directive on Tuesday that ordered the Department of Defense create a Space Force as a sixth military branch. Known as Space Policy Directive 4 (SPD-4), the directive orders the Pentagon draft legislation for Congress that would create the Space Force as a part of the U.S. Air Force,” Michael Sheetz and Amanda Macias report for [CNBC](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6beea4ea77&e=3ee4985eea). This move sets in motion the creation of America’s first new military branch in more than 70 years.
---
|
---
| “The fight against drug trafficking in our country has been a continuous and devastating battle. Millions of American lives have been impacted, and we have seen the destructive power illegal drugs can unleash on a community,” Rep. Michael Guest (R-MS) writes in [Fox News](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a6fdeda080&e=3ee4985eea). “I support President Trump’s plan to secure our border and believe his approach that includes a physical barrier is necessary to protect our communities from the growing dangers of fentanyl, street-level narcotics, and synthetic prescription drugs.”

body:
Your local Republican Party is hard at work! It may be months until Election Day, but many of your local party leaders are currently planning...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/big-speakers-coming-to-your-town?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://www.whitehouse.gov/sotu/?mc_cid=abd4f60d74&mc_eid=[UNIQID]
Fellow Republicans -

Your local Republican Party is hard at work! It may be months until Election Day, but many of your local party leaders are currently planning top-notch Lincoln Day Dinners that will bring big-name speakers into your own backyard over the next few months.

Republicans from across your county will come together to hear from speakers like your local congressman, Indiana GOP Chairman Kyle Hupfer, or someone like Senator Todd Young, Senator Mike Braun, Governor Eric Holcomb or Lt. Governor Suzanne Crouch.

Some counties are taking it even further...and inviting nationally-recognized leaders to your towns for Lincoln Day Dinners, including:
* Congressman Drew Ferguson (Georgia)
* Congresswoman Liz Cheney (Wyoming)
* Radio personality William Cunningham and executive Sean Compton
* NRA president Oliver North
* And more!

Check out the list below, and see when your local Lincoln Day Dinner is scheduled. If you're looking for an opportunity to get involved in your party locally, there's no better opportunity than this!

I knew the Democrats were out of touch, but this Green New Deal is proof they’re not thinking of the average American at all.

This new proposal — the first priority of the new liberal majority — is completely outrageous.

❌They want to limit what you drive.
❌They want to stop all air travel.
❌They want to give money to people “unwilling to work.”
❌They even want to monitor what you eat.

In fact, they’d prefer we all adopt a vegetarian diet immediately - so much so that they want a ban on all meat! The plan also pledges to gut and rebuild every building in America to meet new standards, ban all nuclear energy, guarantee a free education for life, and provide a home and income to every American - even those unwilling to work. In addition, the Green New Deal promises to eliminate 99% of cars and ALL air travel within the next ten years. (No, I’m not kidding.)

subject: A national emergency in plain sight
body:
Five days ago, President Donald J. Trump signed a Homeland Security appropriations bill that secured a number of important legislative victories. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fcb97e95ef&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • February 20, 2019
---
| | |
# **A national emergency in plain sight**

**Five days ago,** President Donald J. Trump signed a Homeland Security appropriations bill that earned a number of important legislative victories for our country. At the same time, he used his legal authority as President to take executive action to address the immediate national security and humanitarian crisis at our Southern Border.

**“It’s very simple:** We want to stop drugs from coming into our country. We want to stop criminals and gangs from coming into our country,” the President said Friday from the White House Rose Garden. “We don’t control our own border.”

**The crisis is real**. Pretending it doesn’t exist is an insult to those who face its consequences every day. “January saw a surprising surge of 22,000 more apprehensions of illegal immigrants at southwest border crossings over January 2018, prompting a key predictor to suggest that border officers will make over 600,000 apprehensions this year,” Paul Bedard reports for the _[Washington Examiner](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=9197e9b51c&e=3ee4985eea)_ _._

**Politicians and the media** should listen to our experts in law enforcement. The lack of physical infrastructure at our southern border is continuously being exploited for illegal purposes, U.S. Customs and Border Protection officials explain. To their point, take a look at a string of recent arrests along our border:
* [103 illegal aliens](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e4ec3b70a9&e=3ee4985eea) from Central America detained Monday morning

* [Two sex offenders](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b56e81dd55&e=3ee4985eea) arrested in separate weekend incidents

* [Multiple criminal aliens](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=717b40b7ba&e=3ee4985eea) arrested over the holiday weekend, including some with warrants and convictions for sexual assault, kidnapping, and murder

* [A convicted rapist](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2926b16dc8&e=3ee4985eea) caught in El Centro, California

* [A previously deported MS-13 gang member](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac41bafd97&e=3ee4985eea) recently apprehended

* [Nearly $1 million of drugs](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ac1e0b5c02&e=3ee4985eea) seized in the Rio Grande Valley

**Behind the numbers** are real stories of suffering. When America can’t vet who crosses its border, our citizens, including legal immigrants, suffer. On Friday, one such “angel mom”—a legal immigrant whose only son was killed by someone here illegally—told CNN’s Jim Acosta something that every American should agree with: “We need to protect this country.”

**Her son’s death was preventable**. Our leaders had the power to stop it, and they chose not to. For years, Washington put political convenience over real national security.

**If that isn’t a crisis,** nothing is.

[President Trump is keeping his promise to secure America’s border.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5ee45ecc67&e=3ee4985eea)

**Watch** : [The border wall is already being built—ahead of schedule.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=18c9d40681&e=3ee4985eea)

name: BernieSanders.com
subject: Why we ask
body:
We thought it was important to explain.
# [](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8915?t=1&akid=577%2E150750%2Et_41yT)

Sisters and Brothers -
We’ve sent a couple fundraising emails since yesterday’s big announcement, so we thought it was important to take a moment to explain why these notes are so important to our campaign.
Here’s the truth: you cannot change a corrupt system by taking its money. And you cannot expect any candidate who courts the support of drug and health insurance companies, the fossil fuel industry, Wall Street and the big banks to actually take them on.
As you know, Bernie doesn’t run around the country begging those folks for money. This campaign is reliant almost exclusively on grassroots, small-dollar donations — most of which come in response to emails like this one.
So, as you see Bernie’s poll numbers climb and our organization grow, it is the response to emails like this that make it happen. And that’s why we ask:
[**Can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? As you go, we go. Whatever we’re able to pull off in this campaign is going to be because people like you contributed to make it happen.**](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190220-2-full-90-plus&t=26&akid=577%2E150750%2Et_41yT)
Remember, every donation is a declaration of support for our campaign and for the values we share. So it isn’t about how much money we raise, but how many donations we receive to fund our effort.
In solidarity,
Team Bernie
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.berniesanders.com/go/8916?refcode=em190220-2-full-90-plus&t=27&akid=577%2E150750%2Et_41yT)

PO BOX 391, Burlington, VT 05402

But we hope you'll stay, because emails are such an important part of how we organize and how we raise money. In fact, there is no single greater source for our campaign's fundraising than emails like this one. And that's important, because no one person, not even Bernie Sanders, can take on Trump and the billionaire class alone.

Before you go about the rest of your day, help power our fight against the billionaire class by [making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bernie-email-template?refcode=em-footer&t=29&refcode2=577_150750_t_41yT&akid=577%2E150750%2Et_41yT).
